title: Semi-detached house for sale in Cecilia Bohl De Faber
description:
Exclusive Spacious House Walking Distance to Puente Romano -Set within a gated community just minutes' walk to Puente Romano Beach Resort, this impeccable and stylish corner townhouse offers luxury living within one of Marbella's most prestigious areas and just minutes from the beach. With 303 m² of living space, it combines high qualities, modern design, privacy, comfort and a prime location.Upon entering, the residence unfolds into an elegant open-plan layout where a designer kitchen seamlessly connects to the living and dining areas. This level extends naturally towards the outdoor spaces, featuring a bespoke outdoor kitchen and inviting terraces designed for entertaining. A private wine cellar further enhances the home’s social appeal.The property offers five bedrooms and six bathrooms, each appointed with bespoke furniture, custom wardrobes with integrated LED lighting, built-in storage beds and high-quality mattresses. Adjustable lighting throughout creates a warm and versatile atmosphere. One bedroom is currently arranged as a cinema and playroom, with the possibility to convert it into a fifth en-suite bedroom if required.A standout feature is the direct private access to the communal swimming pool, a unique privilege exclusive to this residence. The gated Arco Iris community also offers beautifully landscaped gardens and additional pool areas.The home is equipped with advanced energy-efficient systems, including double-glazed windows, enhanced insulation, underfloor heating in bathrooms, air conditioning, a modern fireplace, solar panels and an aerothermal system. Additional features include smart home technology, security systems, a private garage, fibre optic internet, electric blinds, walk-in wardrobe, laundry room, guest toilet, barbecue area and multiple terraces with garden, pool and mountain views.This turnkey residence offers an exceptional blend of location, quality and lifestyle on Marbella’s Golden Mile, ideal as a primary home, elegant holiday retreat or investment.Contact us to arrange your private viewing of this exceptional residence.

Basic features: Parking space included in the price

title: Detached house for sale in Calle Haza del Conde
description:
Set in a prime residential position within Nueva Andalucía, at the heart of Marbella’s Golf Valley, this exceptional villa, known as Centauro 15, presents a sophisticated blend of contemporary architecture and subtle Balinese inspired design. Fully redesigned and renovated in 2025, the property has been conceived to maximise natural light, spatial flow, and a strong connection to its surroundings, while remaining close to the area’s most established lifestyle destinations.From the villa, residents are minutes from leading golf courses including Los Naranjos Golf Club, Real Club de Golf Las Brisas, and Aloha Golf Club, as well as international schools, fine dining, and the vibrant marina of Puerto Banús. The location combines privacy with accessibility, a defining feature of this highly sought after residential area.The exterior spaces are designed to create a private and tranquil setting. A landscaped tropical garden surrounds the villa, complemented by multiple terraces and chill out areas arranged across different levels, all enjoying open views across the golf valley. The layout maximises both space and seclusion while maintaining a close relationship with the natural environment. Three outdoor parking spaces further enhance practicality.Internally, the villa is defined by light, volume, and material consistency. Sloping ceilings and expansive glazing allow natural light to flow throughout, while a palette of neutral tones and high quality finishes creates a calm and refined atmosphere. The main living areas are spacious and interconnected, centred around a fully equipped kitchen and seamlessly linked to the exterior.The property comprises five bedrooms and six bathrooms, five of which are en suite. The principal suite occupies the upper level, offering a private retreat with a walk in wardrobe and open views across the golf valley. The lower level includes an independent apartment with its own kitchen and bathroom, alongside a basement featuring a bar area with direct pool access, a laundry space, and additional areas adaptable for a gym, cinema room, or studio. An additional garage with private access completes this level. The villa is offered fully furnished.Christie’s Insight:From our expert Maya Kandrova, the property is characterised by its balanced integration of contemporary design and natural elements. The quality of the renovation, combined with its position within the Golf Valley, responds to demand for turnkey residences that offer both visual distinction and long term usability, positioning it as a well considered asset within Marbella’s luxury residential landscape.
